2026-03-18T03:10:44.7611989Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7612789Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7613155Z 
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7613379Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7613888Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7614184Z 
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7614296Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7614494Z 
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7614597Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7614773Z 
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7614867Z   git switch -
2026-03-18T03:10:44.7615000Z
